'''Skorr's starship''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Skorr/Legends|Skorr]] while pursuing the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. The vessel was seized by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and Skorr was sent to the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*"[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]" {{Reprint|The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell}} {{1st}}
